achievements.title: ABU Robocon national rounds
achievements.description: Qualified all three years, scoring 96 / 95 / 88 out of 100 in Robot Design Documentation.

achievements.title: 2nd runner-up, Robowars
achievements.description: VIT Vellore Gravitas 2024, serving as primary robot driver in combat matches.

achievements.title: Runners-up, Embaddethon 2024

leadership.description: Led a 40-member team to ABU Robocon 2025; ran operations, treasury, fundraising, and procurement.
Founded and led a 15-member combat robotics team through design, funding, and inter-university competition.

leadership.role: Media & Web Head — CSD Robocon NITK
leadership.description: Revamped the team's digital presence, redesigning websites and outreach platforms.

patents.title: An automated ergonogauge device for measuring three-dimensional spatial data
Orthodontic appliances to prevent tongue-thrusting habit

heroTagline: I build robotic systems end to end — the structure, the circuit boards, and the control that ties them together. From combat arenas and Robocon fields to cryogenic LPG terminals.
